notes: v1.2.0 — Creator tools + a stay-signed-in fix. Export any instance to a shareable .mrpack (right-click an instance → Export as Modpack). Before upgrading Minecraft versions, check which mods are ready (Switch Version → Check Mod Compatibility). Installing a mod now also pulls in its dependencies' dependencies. And the launcher no longer randomly logs you out between sessions — it silently refreshes your session on startup instead of dropping you at the login screen.
